description: Use to create or refresh `~/.claude/claude-spine-profile.md` — the personal calibration file capturing the user's experience level, stack preferences, project context, working style, output format, and risk tolerance. Fires when the profile file does not exist (first-run calibration), or when the user invokes `/onboard` (re-run essentials), `/onboard --deep` (full ~15-question interview), or says "re-onboard" / "update my profile" / "redo onboarding". The profile persists across all projects and is read by Claude at the start of every session.

results.query: redo onboarding for me — I want to refresh the essentials interview, not the deep one
re-onboard — my stack has changed since I set this up, I'm on Next.js + Supabase now, not Rails
update my profile — I'm doing more client work now and less personal MVPs, that should change how you collaborate with me
the onboarding screen is broken on mobile — fix the layout
write the welcome email for new signups
set up a SaaS onboarding flow with email verification for new users
onboard the new junior dev to our codebase — walk her through the structure
what's the right user-onboarding pattern for a B2B SaaS — checklist or guided tour?
